name: NordicStream Fulfillment - Sweden
shortDescription: A sustainability-focused Nordic hub featuring automated storage systems and optimized last-mile distribution across Scandinavia.
description:
NordicStream Fulfillment is built around Scandinavian sustainability standards, featuring energy-efficient climate systems, solar integration, and EV-ready loading bays. Automated storage and retrieval systems maximize vertical capacity and reduce manual handling. Routing algorithms optimize last-mile delivery across Sweden, Norway, and Finland. The facility is ideal for brands prioritizing eco-friendly logistics and reliable cross-Nordic distribution.

Working Hours (CET):
Mon-Fri: 07:00-18:00
Sat: 09:00-13:00
Sun: Closed
